message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

package "com" {
  package "cmput201f10t09" {

    package "vibes" {

      package "dialogs" {
        class MoodFilterDialog
      }

      class SplashActivity
      class LoginActivity
      class SignUpActivity

      package "fragments" {

        package "followingfragment" {
          class FollowingFragment
          class FollowingFragmentAdapter
          FollowingFragment "0..1" o-- "1" FollowingFragmentAdapter
        }

        package "mapfragment" {
          class MapFragment
          class MapFilter
          class UserPoint
          MapFragment "1" o-- "0..*" MapFilter
          MapFragment "1" o-- "0..*" UserPoint
        }

        package "editfragment" {
          class ImageAdapter
          class EditFragment
          ImageAdapter "1" -- "0..1" EditFragment
        }

        package "profilefragment" {
          class ProfileFragment
        }

        package "mooddetailsfragment" {
          class MoodDetailsDialogFragment
          class MoodDetailsFragment
        }

        package "moodlistfragment" {
          class MoodListFragment
          class MoodListFilterFragment
          class MoodListAdapter
          class FollowedMoodListAdapter
          class OwnMoodListAdapter
          class MoodListFilter

          interface MoodListFilterListener

          MoodListFragment "1" o-- "1" MoodListAdapter
          MoodListFragment "1" o-- "0..1" MoodListFilterFragment
          MoodListFilterFragment "1" o-- "1" MoodListFilter

          FollowedMoodListAdapter -|> MoodListAdapter
          OwnMoodListAdapter -|> MoodListAdapter

          MoodListFilterListener ..> MoodListFilterFragment
        }
      }

      class MainActivity

      interface Observer
    }

    package "models" {
      class UserManager
      class Event
      class User
      class MoodEvent
      class EmotionalState

      Event <|-- MoodEvent
      MoodEvent "1" *-- "1" EmotionalState

      UserManager "1" o-- "0..*" User
      User "1" *-- "0..*" MoodEvent
    }

    interface Observable
  }
}

' High-level relations (as in diagram)
MoodFilterDialog ..> MoodListFilter
SplashActivity ..> LoginActivity
LoginActivity ..> SignUpActivity

MainActivity o-- "0..1" ProfileFragment
MainActivity o-- "0..1" EditFragment
MainActivity o-- "0..1" MapFragment
MainActivity o-- "0..1" FollowingFragment
MainActivity o-- "0..1" MoodListFragment
MainActivity o-- "0..1" MoodDetailsFragment
MainActivity o-- "0..1" MoodDetailsDialogFragment

MainActivity ..|> Observer
Observable <|.. Observer

MoodListFragment ..> MoodDetailsFragment
MoodListFragment ..> MoodDetailsDialogFragment
MoodListFragment ..> ProfileFragment
MoodListFragment ..> EditFragment
MoodListFragment ..> MapFragment

MapFragment ..> MoodEvent
MapFragment ..> User
FollowingFragment ..> User
ProfileFragment ..> User
EditFragment ..> MoodEvent

MoodListAdapter ..> MoodEvent
MoodListAdapter ..> User

@enduml
